title: alseuosmiaceae
intro: The Alseuosmiaceae rank is a family of flowering plants. It is a small and ancient family, comprising about 40 species of shrubs and small trees, primarily found in Australia and New Zealand. The Alseuosmiaceae family is characterized by its unique flowers and fruits, often with distinctive shapes and colors. These plants are often found in subtropical and temperate regions, and are known for their diverse range of habitats and adaptations.
